description: Search Viator tours and activities — products, availability, attractions, destinations.
name: io.github.chrischall/viator-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Viator Partner API key (exp-api-key) — free Basic Access affiliate signup at partnerresources.viator.com
environmentVariables.name: VIATOR_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Accept-Language for response text, e.g. en-US, es, fr, de, ja (default en-US)
environmentVariables.name: VIATOR_LANGUAGE

environmentVariables.description: Seconds to cache identical read responses (default 60; 0 disables)
environmentVariables.name: VIATOR_CACHE_TTL

environmentVariables.description: Seconds to cache reference data — destinations, tags, locations, rates (default 3600; 0 disables)
environmentVariables.name: VIATOR_STATIC_CACHE_TTL
